question: does the completed draft improve win-prediction log-loss over side + team-strength (online Elo)?
caveats: holdout is ~a few hundred games; only coarse effects are detectable — treat the CI, not the point estimate, as the result
team strength = online Elo over teamname; rebrands reset ratings
draft features see the COMPLETED draft — this is the easiest possible setting for draft signal; a per-slot head can only have less

champion indicators can proxy residual team identity (signature picks of strong teams) beyond Elo — part of the edge may be who-picks-it, not what-wins; M2b (trailing champ winrate, team-agnostic) also beating M1 suggests the signal is not only that
holdout scored once per design listed here; no further iteration against it
